entities.name: TOMATO SPOTTED WILT VIRUS
entities.description: A virus that infects various plants including groundnuts.

entities.name: TSWV-TX
entities.description: A specific isolate of tomato spotted wilt virus infecting groundnuts in Texas.

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The host plant (Arachis hypogaea) infected by TSWV isolates.

entities.name: USA
entities.description: The country where several TSWV isolates were identified on groundnuts.

entities.name: TEXAS
entities.description: The specific state in the USA where the TSWV-Tx isolate was found.

entities.name: RABBIT ANTISERUM
entities.description: Antibodies produced in rabbits used for serological detection of TSWV.

entities.name: ELISA
entities.description: Enzyme-linked immunosorbent assay used to detect serological reactions between TSWV isolates and antisera.

entities.name: GREEK TSWV ISOLATES
entities.description: Isolates of tomato spotted wilt virus originating from Greece.

entities.name: INDIAN TSWV ISOLATE
entities.description: An isolate of tomato spotted wilt virus originating from India.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country of origin for a specific TSWV isolate.

entities.name: GREECE
entities.description: The country of origin for specific TSWV isolates.

entities.name: ELECTRO-BLOT IMMUNOASSAYS
entities.description: A technique used to detect specific proteins or polypeptides using antibodies.

entities.name: POLYPEPTIDE SPECIES
entities.description: Protein components of the TSWV-Tx virus with molecular weights of 78,000, 54,000, and 27,000 Da.

entities.name: DUTCH TSWV ISOLATE
entities.description: An isolate of tomato spotted wilt virus originating from the Netherlands.

entities.name: AUSTRALIAN TSWV ISOLATE
entities.description: An isolate of tomato spotted wilt virus originating from Australia.

entities.name: NETHERLANDS
entities.description: The country of origin for a specific TSWV isolate.

entities.name: AUSTRALIA
entities.description: The country of origin for a specific TSWV isolate.
